title: Creat(e)ing Baumland
description: "Creat(e)ing Baumland" is a Minecraft modpack that focuses on the core mechanics of the popular "Create" mod, while enhancing the player experience with a diverse range of blocks and decorations.
body: "Creat(e)ing Baumland" is a Minecraft modpack that focuses on the core mechanics of the popular "Create" mod, while enhancing the player experience with a diverse range of blocks and decorations. This modpack is designed to revitalize your Minecraft world, particularly in the Nether and The End, by introducing improved ambiance and aesthetic touches.
